{"code":";; Filter: >400 additions AND no Linear issue linked (closes_linear is nil or empty)
(def big-prs
  (filter (fn [pr]
            (and (> (:additions pr) 400)
                 (or (nil? (:closes_linear pr))
                     (= "" (:closes_linear pr)))))
          all-open-prs))

;; Count per repo
